---
name: spec
description: Start spec-driven development — write a structured specification before writing code. Use when starting a new feature, project, or significant change. Triggers on "/spec" or "write a spec".
---

# Spec

Shortcut entry point for `spec-driven-development`. Invokes the full skill workflow with focused directives.

## Workflow

First, invoke the `spec-driven-development` skill for the full methodology. Then follow these directives:

1. Understand what the user wants to build. Ask clarifying questions about:
   - The objective and target users
   - Core features and acceptance criteria
   - Tech stack preferences and constraints
   - Known boundaries (what to always do, ask first about, and never do)

2. Generate a structured spec covering all six core areas:
   - Objective, Commands, Project Structure, Code Style, Testing Strategy, Boundaries

3. Save the spec as `SPEC.md` in the project root and confirm with the user before proceeding.
